window (not the chat window), so the cat GIF floats without background.

macOS maps right-click to Button-2, not Button-3.

commit.message:
fix(ci): pass Amplify token and add concurrency groups to drift detection (#130)

## Summary
- Add missing `TF_VAR_amplify_github_access_token` env var to the drift
detection workflow — both staging and prod require it for `terraform
plan`
- Add concurrency groups (`terraform-staging`, `terraform-prod`) to
drift detection jobs to prevent DynamoDB state lock races with the main
Terraform workflow

## Root Cause
1. The drift detection workflow was missing the `AMPLIFY_GITHUB_TOKEN`
secret, causing plan failures with: `No value for required variable
"amplify_github_access_token"`
2. The drift detection cron (6:00 UTC) can overlap with Terraform
workflow runs, causing state lock conflicts

## Test plan
- [ ] Manually trigger the drift detection workflow via
`workflow_dispatch` and verify both staging and prod jobs succeed
- [ ] Trigger both workflows simultaneously and verify concurrency
groups serialize them correctly

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent language override during image translation

Add fromImageTranslation guard to language detection useEffect and
language switch monitoring useEffect to prevent AsyncStorage-loaded
language settings from being overwritten by determineTranslateTargetLang.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(pipeline): eliminate Salsa round-trips after ast_to_ir (#450 phase 2) (#486)

After ast_to_ir, the pipeline now stays entirely in arena IR without
any export_to_salsa/import_salsa_module round-trips until the very end.

- Remove Salsa-tracked WasmBinary and wasm_binary.rs module; replace
  with a plain WasmBinary struct in translate.rs (renamed from
  WasmBinaryOutput) so the WASM backend has no Salsa dependency
- compile_to_wasm_binary: run the full WASM pipeline in one arena
  session and return Vec<u8> directly (no intermediate Salsa export)
- compile_to_native_binary: run the full native pipeline in one arena
  session (was previously re-importing from Salsa before Cranelift)
- compile_ast: simplified to run the shared pipeline and export once
  to Salsa, used only for diagnostic/LSP targets; signature changed
  from Result<Module> to Module (infallible)
- dump_ir: new Salsa-tracked function for --dump-ir that prints arena
  IR text directly instead of routing through a Salsa Module
- Remove stage_evidence_params, run_wasm_pipeline, run_native_pipeline,
  run_full_pipeline, stage_lower_to_wasm, with_arena_session helpers
  that existed solely to bridge Salsa↔arena at intermediate stages
- Update tests to use run_through_evidence_params (arena-based) and
  plain Vec<u8> bytes

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: 팀 구성 이력에 두레이 전송 버튼 추가

- 저장된 이력 펼치면 '두레이 전송' 버튼 표시
- 기존 team-notify API 재사용

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Harden core runtime: auth, concurrency, timeouts, and security fixes

- Add API key authentication (Bearer/X-API-Key) on all REST endpoints
- Add secret sanitization on connection list responses
- Add error message sanitization to prevent info leakage
- Add command idempotency via idempotency_key
- Add asyncio.Lock on registry commission/teardown to prevent races
- Add asyncio.Lock on all state store writes to prevent SQLITE_BUSY
- Enable SQLite WAL mode + busy_timeout for concurrent reads
- Add schema migration framework with versioned migrations
- Batch inventory persistence into single transaction
- Add timeouts on commission (30s), inventory (60s), execute (30s), health (10s)
- Add scheduler poll timeout (15s) to prevent hangs on stuck reads
- Add auto-recovery for suspended poll targets (retry every 5 min)
- Mark failed connection restores as disconnected instead of stale
- Fix ONVIF SOAP XML injection via xml.sax.saxutils.escape
- Log warnings for failed adapter imports with specific dependency info
- Add 23 API tests covering auth, endpoints, idempotency, error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: audit --json for machine-readable audit output (3.4.0) (#161)

- Add --json flag to `carson audit` for structured JSON output.
  JSON envelope includes command, status, branch, hooks, main_sync,
  pr, checks, baseline, problems, and exit_code.

- Agents can parse audit results programmatically instead of
  regex-matching human-readable text.

- Human output unchanged when --json is not passed.

commit.message:
升级为专业ECharts散点地图方案

实现功能：
- 使用阿里云DataV GeoAtlas中国地图JSON
- 基于ECharts实现散点标记
- 根据预警等级显示不同颜色和大小
  - 红色预警：30px，脉冲效果
  - 橙色预警：25px，脉冲效果
  - 黄色预警：20px，脉冲效果
  - 蓝色预警：15px，脉冲效果

commit.message:
fix: add 'self' to CSP style-src so Astro's extracted CSS loads in production

Astro production builds extract <style is:global> into /_astro/*.css files
loaded via <link rel="stylesheet">. The previous CSP only had 'unsafe-inline'
(covers inline <style> tags) but not 'self' (needed for same-origin .css files),
causing the entire stylesheet to be blocked in production.

commit.message:
fix(shopify): read discount_allocations for automatic discounts

Shopify puts automatic discounts (e.g. "Descuento Miembro" percentage)
in line_item.discount_allocations instead of total_discount. The mapper
now sums discount_allocations when total_discount is 0, for both
shop_money (USD) and presentment_money (COP).

Added unit tests covering: automatic discounts, direct discounts,
no discounts, multiple allocations, missing amount_set, and a full
integration test with real order #67269 JSON data.

Add .dockerignore to prevent Windows node_modules overwriting Linux ones

This caused silent crashes (Prisma, bcrypt etc. have native bindings).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: populate OTel resource attributes from OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES env var (#163)

resource.New() was not using resource.WithFromEnv(), so resource
attributes set via OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES (including
nul.deployment_id and deployment.environment) were never attached
to the OTel resource. This meant they appeared on target_info but
not on any application metric (nul_pipeline_event_total,
nul_scan_duration_seconds, etc.), making per-customer metric
queries impossible.

commit.message:
fix: stabilize glossary selector to prevent React 19 infinite loop (#185)

The `?? []` fallback in useGlossaryStore selector created a new array
reference on every getSnapshot() call when glossary was null, triggering
React 19's useSyncExternalStore consistency check infinite loop.

Use a module-level EMPTY_TERMS constant for referential stability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Move event categorization into build pipeline, seed all cities

Categories now live in events.json instead of being applied post-hoc
to Supabase. New build flow:
1. ics_to_json generates fresh events.json (no categories)
2. merge_categories.py carries forward categories from previous build
3. classify_events_json.py classifies only new events via Claude Haiku
4. load-events upserts to Supabase with categories included

All 7 cities seeded: ~18,500 events classified across santarosa,
petaluma, toronto, bloomington, raleighdurham, montclair, davis.
